name: split-sheet
description: Side-by-side sheet layout combining LeftSheet (1/3) + RightSheet (2/3) panels.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the split sheet layout is visible on screen.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when either panel is dismissed or the backdrop is tapped.

props.name: leftContent
props.description: Content rendered inside the left panel (occupies 1/3 of screen width).

props.name: rightContent
props.description: Content rendered inside the right panel (occupies 2/3 of screen width).

props.name: showHandle
props.description: Whether to show drag handle indicators on both panels.

props.name: leftStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the left panel container.

props.name: rightStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the right panel container.
